Localization.Description: User modify logconf file on host

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: There were changes in the directory with configuration files "{object.path}" on host {event_src.host}
Unsuccessful attempt to make changes in the directory with configuration files "{object.path}" on host {event_src.host}
The configuration file "{object.path}" was changed on host {event_src.host}
Unsuccessful attempt to change configuration file "{object.path}" on host {event_src.host}
